paper_title: De novo development of small cyclic peptides that are orally bioavailable
why_selected: Open article with iterative cyclic peptide optimization; source data includes permeability percentage for compounds 38-46 and oral bioavailability endpoints.
expected_use: small case-study benchmark; useful for top-k recovery around late-stage optimization 43->46
status: raw_downloaded_partial; permeability table for peptides 38-46 curated; needs structure/edit mapping from figures/SI to model_ready JSONL

paper_title: Membrane Permeability in a Large Macrocyclic Peptide Driven by a Saddle-Shaped Conformation
why_selected: Large 2024 macrocyclic peptide permeability series; CycPeptMPDB lists it as 2024_Faris, likely easiest to convert once raw rows are obtained.
expected_use: main external ranking benchmark if compound table can be downloaded or exported
status: raw_cycpeptmpdb_csv_downloaded; 234 rows; ready for source-level external model-ready conversion

paper_title: Analogs of Cyclic Peptide Mortiamide-D From Marine Fungi Have Improved Membrane Permeability and Kill Drug-Resistant Melanoma Cells
why_selected: Recent natural-product analog optimization series; not present in local training source list; CycPeptMPDB page exists.
status: raw_cycpeptmpdb_csv_downloaded; 3 rows; useful only as tiny case study, not main benchmark

paper_title: PEGASUS: Unlocking Polarity in Cell-Permeable Cyclic Peptides Using AI Models Built on Massively Parallel Biological Assays
why_selected: Newest AI-guided cyclic peptide permeability design dataset with public figshare CSV supplement.
expected_use: method-level external comparison and possible permeability ranking benchmark after checking assay compatibility with PAMPA labels
status: raw_csv_downloaded; contains 22 sequences with SMILES and logD/descriptors, not direct PAMPA; use as auxiliary/generalization set unless permeability labels found elsewhere
